title: Parent timeline syncs with subtask timeline
excerpt:
Hello… 
I would like to make a timeline column of the parent task be linked and changed by the earliest and latest of the subitems timeline column? Note: the option to show a summary column, is just a mirror column, and …

posts.author: GavinPowell (Gavin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello…

I would like to make a timeline column of the parent task be linked and changed by the earliest and latest of the subitems timeline column? Note: the option to show a summary column, is just a mirror column, and you cant use this for dependencies so doesn’t help us. Any suggestions on how to work aroudn this?

posts.author: EMorton (Erik Morton)
posts.cookedHtml: Well, I was going to suggest the summary method, but yeah if the the lack of dependency functionality is an issue for you, then that won’t work. I’ve got another thread tied to just straight up asking for Dependency Automation to work with subitems over here, but I’m adding a vote to yours as well since it’s another approach to resolving some of the underlying issues I’m seeing.

posts.author: Topio (Javier Silva)
posts.cookedHtml: @GavinPowell You would need to heavily promote your request by participating on the community because just 2 Votes is not going to make this happen

posts.author: Smitha20 (Abby)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also really appreciate this feature! Thanks for creating this request!

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature is essential and should be made native ASAP…

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Admeirel, @abby

We developed an app called subitem automations that’s solves most of subitem dependency use cases. Here are a few examples →

You can either make sure that the timeline of the parent item adjust to fit the timeline of its subitems →

Screenshot 2025-01-23 at 17.33.442252×600 41.9 KB

Screenshot 2025-01-23 at 17.34.022154×576 41 KB

Or make sure that the subitems fit into the parent item →

Screenshot 2025-01-23 at 17.34.292084×732 50.7 KB

Or a simple rollup →

Screenshot 2025-01-23 at 17.35.301946×632 39.3 KB

There are many other options but I hope this delivers the essence across.

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - Subitem Automations - monday.com Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: sarah.morrison (Sarah Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml: For a project management tool, this should have been made a native feature a long time ago! Without this feature, using subitems at all is cumbersome to manage.
